temporal_description: A close-up, slightly shaky shot focuses on a dark wooden door in a dimly lit room. A red diamond-shaped paper with a green Chinese character, likely "福" for "fortune" or "good luck," is taped to the door. To the right of the door, a framed black-and-white photograph hangs on a wall with pale, tiled surfaces. In the upper left corner of the frame, the white Chinese characters "风行网" are visible. The audio opens with a man calling out in a slightly urgent and questioning tone, "Hey, brother." The camera pulls back to a wider shot, revealing three men in a dark, narrow room. An older man with gray hair, wearing a light-colored suit jacket and a light blue shirt, steps out of the doorway. He gestures with his hand as he moves forward. Behind him, another man in a patterned shirt and a third man in a dark suit follow. The room is cluttered and appears old, with peeling tiles on the wall and framed pictures hanging in the background. Another man responds with a calm and direct "Let's go." The first man then calls out again, his voice becoming more insistent and a bit louder as he tries to get someone's attention, "Brother Chen, Brother Chen, Brother Chen." The camera remains stationary, capturing the men as they move through the space. Throughout the exchange, a subtle, low-key instrumental track with a slightly tense and atmospheric mood plays softly in the background, creating a sense of anticipation.
